channel.title: Manuru Nithin Padiyar | FLAME Lab, CDS, IISc

item.title: Manuru Nithin Padiyar
item.description: Machine Learning and Mathematics enthusiast with a foundation in Mechanical Engineering. I am currently working on problems related to the characterization and prediction of extreme events in turbulence as well as chemical mechanism optimization using deep learning methods. My interests and hobbies are as erratic as my sleep schedule. If you see me (or don’t) around, feel free to talk to me about literally anything.
